title: Automata Studio
desc: Build and simulate DFAs, NFAs, GNFAs, PDAs, Turing Machines, and CFGs in the browser. Convert between representations — NFA→DFA, DFA minimisation, GNFA→regex, regex→NFA, and CFG→CNF — with step-by-step visualisation and LaTeX export.

title: Turing Machine Simulator
desc: Write transition rules in a plain-text format, load a tape, and step through the universal model of computation. Classic 1D mode with breakpoints and a test suite, or 2D mode where the head moves on an infinite grid with Game of Life import.

title: Game of Life
desc: Conway’s classic cellular automaton on a configurable grid. Draw patterns, run generations, and export the board state directly into the 2D Turing Machine simulator.

title: Boids
desc: Craig Reynolds’ classic emergent flocking algorithm from 1987. Three local forces — separation, alignment, cohesion — produce complex collective motion from zero central coordination.

title: Tic Tac Toe
desc: Four variants on the classic 3×3 grid — a perfect minimax AI, an easy one-ply opponent, a handicapped baby-mode, and a local two-player mode. Pick your difficulty.
